---
title: ""
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    css: styles.css
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
    title-block-banner: false
---

<!-- ╔══════════════════════════════════════════════════╗ -->
<!--                    HERO SECTION                       -->
<!-- ╚══════════════════════════════════════════════════╝ -->

::: {.hero}
::: {.hero-text}

[Nutrition · Food Service · Healthcare]{.hero-eyebrow}

[Vanessa]{.hero-name}  
[Santos Salgado Almeida Marques]{.hero-name}

[Empowering lifestyle change through nutrition and community care.]{.hero-tagline}

::: {.hero-bio}
I am a Food Service and Nutrition professional with **14 years of experience** spanning vending machine operations, food safety management, and client-centred nutrition care. Currently completing an **MBA in AI & Machine Learning Leadership** at University Canada West (2026), I bring clinical depth together with emerging business and technology acumen.

Originally from Brazil, I now call **Coquitlam, BC** home — and I am passionate about making good nutrition accessible, safe, and sustainable for every community I serve.
:::

<a href="contact.html" class="download-btn">✉ Get in Touch</a>
&nbsp;
<a href="resume.html" class="download-btn" style="background:var(--sage-dark)">📄 View Resume</a>

:::

::: {.hero-photo}
![](Vanessa_nutritionist.jpg){style="width:220px;height:220px;border-radius:16px;object-fit:cover;object-position:top center;"}
:::
:::
:::

<!-- ╔══════════════════════════════════════════════════╗ -->
<!--                  CONTACT STRIP                        -->
<!-- ╚══════════════════════════════════════════════════╝ -->

::: {.contact-strip}
📧 [vasalga29\@gmail.com](mailto:vasalga29@gmail.com)
[·]{.sep}
💼 [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/vanessamarques-nutrition-operations)
[·]{.sep}
📍 Coquitlam, BC, Canada
:::

---

<!-- ╔══════════════════════════════════════════════════╗ -->
<!--                   STATS ROW                           -->
<!-- ╚══════════════════════════════════════════════════╝ -->

::: {.stats-row}
::: {.stat-card}
::: {.stat-number}
14
:::
::: {.stat-label}
Years of Experience
:::
:::

::: {.stat-card}
::: {.stat-number}
4
:::
::: {.stat-label}
Certifications & Credentials
:::
:::

::: {.stat-card}
::: {.stat-number}
3
:::
::: {.stat-label}
Languages Spoken
:::
:::
:::

---

<!-- ╔══════════════════════════════════════════════════╗ -->
<!--               ABOUT + EDUCATION (2-COL)               -->
<!-- ╚══════════════════════════════════════════════════╝ -->

::: {.two-col}

::: {.section-box}
::: {.section-title-accent}
::: {.title-dot}
:::
## About Me
:::

I am a Nutrition and Food Service professional with 14 years of experience across clinical practice, food service operations, and community health. My career began in Brazil, where I worked as a clinical nutritionist providing personalised care in private practice, sports settings, and community programs. I also spent several years managing operations for a large vending machine network, overseeing inventory, supplier relations, and food safety compliance. 


I am currently completing an MBA in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning Leadership at University Canada West, which has allowed me to combine my clinical background with business strategy and emerging technology.

Since moving to Canada, I have been involved in community volunteering, including food distribution with Cityreach Care Society and, more recently, supporting pregnant women and new mothers through Vancouver Coastal Health's Healthiest Babies Possible program.

I am open to connecting with healthcare organizations, food service businesses, and anyone working at the intersection of nutrition, operations, and community health.
:::

::: {.section-box}
::: {.section-title-accent}
::: {.title-dot}
:::
## Education
:::

**MBA — AI & Machine Learning Leadership**  
*University Canada West, Vancouver, BC*  
[Expected 2026]{style="font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:0.78rem;color:var(--terra);"}

---

**Bachelor of Science in Nutrition**  
*Centro Universitário São Camilo, São Paulo, Brazil*  
[Graduated]{style="font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:0.78rem;color:var(--terra);"}

---

**Diploma in Food Technology**  
*UNICAMP — Universidade Estadual de Campinas, Campinas, Brazil*  
[Graduated]{style="font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:0.78rem;color:var(--terra);"}

---

### Continuing Education
- Functional Sports Nutrition Certificate
- Industry Management Certificate *(USP) - Faculty of Medical Sciences of Santa Casa de São Paulo*
- FoodSafe Level 2 *(BC, Canada)*
:::

:::

<!-- ╔══════════════════════════════════════════════════╗ -->
<!--               COMMUNITY & HIGHLIGHTS                  -->
<!-- ╚══════════════════════════════════════════════════╝ -->

::: {.content-area}

::: {.section-box}
::: {.section-title-accent}
::: {.title-dot}
:::
## Professional Highlights
:::

::: {.timeline}

::: {.timeline-item}
::: {.timeline-date}
March 2026 – Present
:::
::: {.timeline-title}
Volunteer — Healthiest Babies Possible Program
:::
::: {.timeline-org}
Vancouver Coastal Health (VCH), BC
:::
::: {.timeline-body}
Supporting a community nutrition program focused on maternal and infant health, helping vulnerable families access guidance and resources during pregnancy and early infancy.
:::
:::

::: {.timeline-item}
::: {.timeline-date}
July 2025 – February 2026
:::
::: {.timeline-title}
Food Bank Volunteer
:::
::: {.timeline-org}
Cityreach Care Society, Coquitlam, BC
:::
::: {.timeline-body}
Food sorting, quality checking, and distribution to community families in need. Applied food safety knowledge to ensure donated products met safe consumption standards.
:::
:::

::: {.timeline-item}
::: {.timeline-date}
2021 - 2024
:::
::: {.timeline-title}
Clinical Nutritionist — Independent Practice
:::
::: {.timeline-org}
Brazil
:::
::: {.timeline-body}
Provided personalised nutrition consultations across clinical, sports, and community settings. Developed individualised meal plans addressing chronic disease, athletic performance, weight management, and maternal/paediatric nutrition.
:::
:::

::: {.timeline-item}
::: {.timeline-date}
2010 – 2018
:::
::: {.timeline-title}
Operations Coordinator — Automatic Vending Machines
:::
::: {.timeline-org}
Private Sector, São Paulo State, Brazil
:::
::: {.timeline-body}
Managed end-to-end operations of a multi-location vending machine network, overseeing inventory, supplier negotiations, quality compliance, and HACCP-aligned food safety protocols.
:::
:::

:::
